news.headline: New Govt Guidelines establish rules for AI tools to enhance national security with safe implementation.
news.summary: A recent national security memorandum outlined procedures for government agencies to enhance efficiency through the use of artificial intelligence in a secure manner. Key guidelines include leveraging AI technology to streamline operations and ensure national security. The memorandum emphasizes the importance of implementing safe and effective practices when integrating AI, aiming to enhance organizational effectiveness and protect sensitive information. This initiative underscores the government's commitment to harnessing the potential of AI while prioritizing safety and security.

news.headline: India's digital twin manufacturing revolution fueled by NVIDIA Omniverse. Ola Electric and Reliance Industries at the forefront. #AI #efficiency
news.summary: Major Indian manufacturers are utilizing NVIDIA Omniverse and AI technologies to improve efficiency and planning in their factories. Notable companies such as Ola Electric and Reliance Industries are at the forefront of adopting digital twin technology. This innovation aims to revolutionize traditional manufacturing processes through advanced simulation and data analysis. This strategic move has the potential to significantly boost productivity and competitiveness in the industry.

news.headline: NVIDIA launches three AI computers, transforming robotics with powerful computing for industries like manufacturing. Learn more.
news.summary: NVIDIA's cutting-edge computing technology is set to transform physical artificial intelligence across various sectors such as manufacturing and robotics by offering improved capabilities in training, simulation, and inference. This breakthrough is expected to significantly enhance efficiency and productivity in these industries.

news.headline: Strive Health achieves highest per-beneficiary savings in Medicare Kidney Model with net savings in 100% of KCEs.
news.summary: Strive Health, a prominent figure in value-based kidney care, achieved remarkable results in the Comprehensive Kidney Care Contracting (CKCC) program for the 2022 performance year. Their efforts led to net savings in all 100% of its Kidney Contracting Entities (KCEs), surpassing other participating organizations with the highest per-beneficiary savings. Designed by the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS), the CKCC model aims to enhance outcomes and lower expenses for Medicare beneficiaries with chronic kidney issues.

news.headline: U-Haul opens 840-room self-storage facility in Olive Branch, MS serving DeSoto County residents.
news.summary: U-Haul® recently opened its inaugural retail, moving, and self-storage facility in Olive Branch, Mississippi, aiming to cater to the needs of DeSoto County residents. Operating at 4209 Goodman Road, the U-Haul Moving & Storage center officially opened its doors on October 18th. The store operates from 7 a.m. to 7 p.m. Monday through Thursday and Saturday, from 7 a.m. to 8 p.m. on Fridays, and 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. on Sundays. Customers can book storage units or moving equipment via the U-Haul app or by contacting the Olive Branch U-Haul branch directly.

news.headline: Stock of Harley-Davidson drops by 2.7% despite beating earnings due to revised guidance.
The Joint Corp. to discuss Q3 2024 results in conference call on Nov 7th, largest franchisor of chiropractic care.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, on October 24, 2024, The Joint Corp., listed as JYNT on NASDAQ, the leading franchisor of chiropractic services via The Joint Chiropractic® network, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Thursday, November 7, 2024, post market hours.

news.headline: HYPE Innovation named top in Innovation Management by third year in a row in SPARK Matrix. Germany, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: A recent report by an independent research firm has named HYPE Innovation as the top choice for enterprises. The German-based company has been acknowledged as a Leader in Innovation Management for the third year in a row in the latest SPARK MatrixTM released by QKS. This recognition further solidifies HYPE Innovation's position as a key player in the industry. The company's continued success highlights its dedication to providing high-quality services, with its reputation being upheld consistently over the years.

news.headline: Corporate emphasis on sustainability rises with 53% of 600 CFOs prioritizing ESG strategies for a sustainable future.
news.summary: In Shanghai on October 24, 2024, it was reported that ESG-focused brands are significantly contributing to building a sustainable future amidst the changing global energy scenario and escalating climate issues. As per Thomson Reuters' Mid-year status report, a notable 53% of 600 middle-market CFOs have emphasized the importance of ESG initiatives.

news.headline: Ayana Bio to present its health & wellness ingredients at SupplySide West 2024, including NeuroAdvantage and ImmunAdvantage. Booth #7071.
news.summary: Ayana Bio, a company specializing in plant cell technology for sustainable bioactive production, will showcase its NeuroAdvantage and ImmunAdvantage prototypes at booth #7071 during SupplySide West event in Boston on October 24, 2024. This signifies Ayana Bio's commitment to introducing innovative consumer products in the market.

news.headline: MINISO opens IP Collection Store at Eaton Centre Toronto on Oct 19, featuring Sanrio characters, following success of West Vancouver flagship store.
news.summary: On October 19, 2024, MINISO, a well-known worldwide lifestyle brand, unveiled its latest IP Collection Store at Eaton Centre in Toronto. This store showcases the popular Sanrio characters and follows the accomplishments of the flagship store in West Vancouver.

news.headline: CompScience, backed by Nationwide, reduces worker safety incidents dramatically with Keystone Natural Foods.
news.summary: Utilizing AI technology to revolutionize broker partnerships and enhance customer contentment, CompScience, an MGA supported by Nationwide, unveiled a case study with Keystone Natural Holdings, exhibiting a significant decrease in customer response time by 40%, from 24 hours to 14 hours. This initiative showcases a substantial improvement in broker relationships and elevated client satisfaction. The partnership aims to optimize efficiency and effectiveness in the insurance industry through innovative AI solutions.

news.headline: Old Navy's holiday campaign "Love is in the House" features Jennifer Hudson, promoting style and fun.
news.summary: In San Francisco on October 24, 2024, the clothing brand Old Navy announced the debut of their new campaign, "Love is in the House," featuring Jennifer Hudson, renowned for achieving an Emmy, Grammy, Oscar, and Tony (EGOT) award. The campaign aims to invite customers to explore their style choices during the holiday season.

news.headline: Expro Group (NYSE: XPRO) Q3 2024 revenue $423M vs. last quarter at $470M, down 10%. Lower activity in NLA and Europe.
news.summary: In Houston, Expro Group Holdings N.V. (NYSE: XPRO) announced their financial and operational performance for the three and nine months ending on September 30, 2024. During the third quarter of 2024, the company generated a revenue of $423 million, reflecting a decrease of $47 million or 10% compared to the second quarter of the same year, which had revenues of $470 million. This decline was primarily attributed to reduced activity levels in the North and Latin America (“NLA”) and Europe and Sub-Sa regions, in line with the company's projections.

news.headline: PTC Therapeutics to discuss Q3 2024 financial results in webcast on Nov. 7, 2024.
news.summary: PTC Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed that they will be conducting a webcast conference call to divulge their financial results for the third quarter of 2024 and give insights into the company's operations and future plans. The event is scheduled to take place on Thursday, November 7. PTC Therapeutics, Inc.'s stock is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol PTCT.

news.headline: DefenAge Skincare introduces the 12-Factor Revitalizing Lip Enhancer for fuller, smoother, more youthful lips. #NewLaunch
news.summary: A groundbreaking anti-aging serum designed to enhance lip fullness and smoothness has been introduced in Carlsbad, California. DefenAge Skincare proudly presents the 12-Factor Revitalizing Lip Enhancer, a unique product aimed at promoting more youthful lips. Launched on October 24, 2024, this innovative serum is formulated to provide comprehensive revitalization with 12 key factors, setting it apart in the skincare market.

news.headline: InMode Ltd. (Nasdaq: INMD) granted injunction against online sellers selling counterfeit Morpheus8 devices, via PRNewswire.
news.summary: In Irvine, California on October 24, 2024, InMode Ltd. (Nasdaq: INMD), a prominent global provider of pioneering medical technologies, has received a preliminary injunction from the U.S. District Court for the Central District of California. This ruling comes as part of a lawsuit aimed at sellers that were uncovered in the legal action.

news.headline: Nasdaq to pay $0.24/share quarterly dividend on Dec 20, 2024 to shareholders of record on Dec 6, 2024.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Nasdaq, Inc. (Nasdaq: NDAQ) announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.24 per share for its outstanding common stock. Shareholders of record as of December 6, 2024, will receive the dividend on December 20, 2024. The approval for future quarterly dividends, as well as record and payment dates, is subject to the Board of Directors' discretion.

news.headline: Catalyst Bancorp, Inc. reported $447,000 net income in Q3 2024, with $12.6 million loan growth. Net interest margin was 3.86%. Deposit of $167.4 million showed a decrease of $12.6 million, including $21.0 million public fund deposits. Non-interest income was $620,000. Non-interest expenses were $2.3 million, increased by $192,000 from the previous quarter. The Company repurchased 79,400 shares of common stock. Total assets were at $280.6 million on September 30, 2024. Visit www.catalystbank.com for more info.
news.summary: Catalyst Bancorp, Inc. reported a third-quarter net income of $447,000, a decrease of $80,000 from the previous quarter. The net income included a $238,000 pre-tax benefit from a grant program. The loan portfolio grew by $12.6 million, totaling $165.9 million at the end of September 2024. Non-performing assets were at $1.6 million, with non-performing loans consisting mainly of residential mortgage loans. Total deposits stood at $167.4 million, down $12.6 million from the previous quarter. The company's net interest margin for the quarter was 3.86%, with net interest income of $2.5 million, up 3% from the previous quarter. Non-interest income was $620,000, and non-interest expenses totaled $2.3 million. Catalyst Bancorp repurchased shares of its common stock and had consolidated shareholders' equity of $81.7 million.

news.headline: Harley-Davidson reports Q3 results with diluted EPS of $0.91, operating income of $106M (down 49%), and a 13% decrease in global retail sales. Operating margin decreased to 9.2%. Full-year 2024 outlook includes HDMC revenue down 14-16% and LiveWire operating loss of $105-$115M.
news.summary: Harley-Davidson reported third-quarter 2024 results, with diluted EPS at $0.91 and consolidated operating income at $106 million (down 49% from the previous year). North American retail sales were down 10% in Q3, and global retail sales were down 13% year-over-year. HDMC gross margin was 30.1% in Q3. HDFS operating income was up 29% year-over-year. Harley-Davidson lowered its full-year 2024 financial outlook. LiveWire electric motorcycle unit sales were notably up by 98%. The company's 2024 financial outlook includes an expected revenue decline and operating income margin for HDMC, while HDFS operating income is anticipated to rise. The company generated $931 million in cash from operating activities and repurchased $350 million of shares YTD. Their cash and cash equivalents stood at $2.2 billion. Harley-Davidson highlighted various factors that could affect its future results and cause them to differ from anticipated outcomes.

news.headline: Checkmarx leads in Frost Radar™: Application Security Posture Management 2024 with 21.3% market share and top ranking in Innovation Index.
news.summary: In Paramus, New Jersey, Checkmarx, a top provider of cloud-native application security for businesses, has been recognized as the leading company in Frost & Sullivan's Frost Radar™ for Application Security Posture Management (ASPM) in 2024. With a remarkable 21.3% market share, Checkmarx secured the top position on the Radar Growth Index. Additionally, the company excelled on the Innovation Index. This acknowledgment reflects Checkmarx's strong performance in addressing the growing security needs of organizations amidst rising volumes and sophistication of cyber threats.

news.headline: Alkermes reported Q3 2024 with revenues of $378.1M, net income of $92.8M, and EPS of $0.56. Company aims for financial goals and advances pipeline.
news.summary: Alkermes plc reported strong financial results for the third quarter of 2024. Total revenues were $378.1 million, with proprietary net sales increasing around 18% year-over-year to $273.0 million. GAAP net income from continuing operations was $92.8 million, with diluted GAAP earnings per share from continuing operations at $0.56. Revenues for key products like VIVITROL, ARISTADAi, and LYBALVI showed growth. The company reiterated its 2024 financial expectations and emphasized the potential of its investigational orexin 2 receptor agonist, ALKS 2680. Alkermes also disclosed plans for phase 2 studies and initiatives to drive shareholder value. Cash and investments totaled $927.8 million, with outstanding debt at $288.8 million. Alkermes also repurchased 4.4 million shares in Q3. The company's focus on neuroscience and development of innovative medicines remains strong, with a portfolio addressing various disorders. Non-GAAP measures like EBITDA were used for assessing performance. Alkermes highlighted the promise of orexin portfolio candidates and latest clinical data on ALKS 2680 in various sleep disorders. The company emphasized financial outlook, development goals, and initiatives to create value for shareholders and drive growth.

news.headline: Toy maker's share price soars after beating profit estimates in third quarter.
Acushnet Holdings Corp. (NYSE: GOLF) will release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7 at 6:45 am EST. Details on IR website.
news.summary: Acushnet Holdings Corp. (NYSE: GOLF) is set to release its third-quarter financial results on November 7, 2024, at around 6:45 a.m. ET. The results will be accessible through the Acushnet Investor Relations website and the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission portal. Stay tuned for important updates regarding Acushnet's performance in Q3 of 2024.

news.headline: N-able launches global compliance initiatives to aid IT service providers in meeting regulatory requirements. #NABL
news.summary: N-able, Inc., a renowned software company traded on NYSE under the symbol NABL, headquartered in Burlington, Massachusetts, has announced the rollout of enhanced global compliance efforts. These initiatives are tailored to support IT service providers in delivering remote monitoring, management solutions, data protection services, and security measures. The company has unveiled designated resources to aid partners in bolstering cyber resilience and preparedness. The focus is to assist partners in complying with various cybersecurity-focused frameworks. This initiative comes shortly after the completion of the Cybersecurity Maturation Model.

news.headline: Ardagh Group S.A. reports Q3 2024 financial results on Oct. 24 - details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Luxembourg-based Ardagh Group S.A. announced its financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The details of the report can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Savers Value Village to release Q3 fiscal 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024 after market close, with conference call at 4:30pm ET.
news.summary: Retailer Savers Value Village, Inc. based in Bellevue, Washington has disclosed that it will reveal its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2024 on November 7, 2024, after the stock market closes. Furthermore, a conference call is scheduled for the same day at 4:30 p.m. ET to delve into the financial results. Those interested in joining the discussion can dial +1 800 549 8228 (for international callers, dial +1 289 819 1520) approximately 10 minutes before the conference begins.

news.headline: Beyond, Inc. (NYSE:BYON) reports Q3 2024 financial results, showing improved gross margin and cost reductions.
news.summary: Beyond, Inc. (NYSE: BYON) based in Midvale, Utah, recently released its financial performance for the third quarter ending on September 30, 2024. The company, specializing in ecommerce and affinity data monetization, showcased progress with an uptick in gross margin and efficiency due to cost-saving measures. Beyond, Inc. offers a range of products and services to help customers optimize their living spaces. For the latest quarter, the company displayed a positive trend in financial performance.

news.headline: Universal Electronics Inc. will host Q3 2024 financial results call on Nov 7 in Scottsdale, Arizona. #UEIC #ConsumerElectronics
news.summary: Universal Electronics Inc. based in Scottsdale, Arizona, a leading company in consumer electronics, will be conducting a conference call to discuss their financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The call is scheduled to take place on November 7th. Investors and analysts will have the opportunity to hear about the company's performance and ask questions during the call. This event is crucial for stakeholders to stay updated on the company's progress.

news.headline: Old Republic reported $229.2M pretax income in Q3 2024, a 8.6% decrease YoY. Net income was $338.9M in Q3, $747.6M in 9 months 2024.
news.summary: Old Republic International Corporation (ORI) reported impressive financial results for the quarters and nine months ended on September 30, 2024. Their pretax income stood at $426.9 million for the quarter and $939.0 million for the nine months, marking significant growth from the previous year. Net income for the same periods was $338.9 million and $747.6 million respectively. Per diluted share, net income was $1.32 for the quarter and $2.81 for the nine months. The combined ratio was at 95.0%, while the shareholders' equity (book value) saw a 0.5% increase to $6,445.3 million. General Insurance pretax operating income decreased by 8.5% for the quarter but increased by 4.6% for the nine months. Title Insurance pretax operating income improved by 7.5% for the quarter. Net operating income per diluted share was $0.71, with consolidated net premiums and fees earned increasing by 9.6%. Total capital returned to shareholders during the quarter was $232 million, including repurchases of $165 million. Book value per share was up by 13.7% since 2023. Operating income, excluding investment gains and losses, is the key metric for Old Republic, with a focus on profitability over the long term and balance sheet strength. The company's revenue, net investment income, and total operating revenues have shown substantial growth, while operating expenses have also increased. Overall, Old Republic International Corporation's financial performance indicates a robust and profitable operation during the specified periods.

news.headline: Rockwell Automation (NYSE: ROK) to report Q4 & full year 2024 results and introduce fiscal 2025 guidance on Nov 7. Conference call at 7:30am.
news.summary: Milwaukee-based company Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) is set to announce its Q4 and full-year fiscal 2024 results and provide fiscal 2025 guidance on November 7 before the market opens. The information will be available on the Rockwell Investor Relations website. A conference call to review the quarterly results is scheduled for 7:30 a.m. CDT on Nov. 7, and will be accessible via audio webcast.

news.headline: Moving iMage Technologies CEO Phil Rafnson pens annual shareholder letter; company to report first quarter of fiscal 2025 in November.
news.summary: In Fountain Valley, California, Moving iMage Technologies (NYSE American: MITQ) released their annual shareholder letter from Chairman, CEO, and President Phil Rafnson. The company, a prominent technology and services provider for cinema, Esports, stadiums, arenas, and other out-of-home entertainment venues, is gearing up to report their first quarter of fiscal 2025 in November. Rafnson expressed excitement as he reflected on the past year and shared optimism about the future.

news.headline: Identiv partners to drive NFC-enabled digital product passports, webinar on Nov 6 with NFC Forum, STMicroelectronics, BoardPusher.
news.summary: An upcoming webinar hosted by Identiv, Inc. is set to highlight the importance of NFC technology in promoting sustainability. The webinar, scheduled for November 6, 2024, will feature key industry players including Identiv, NFC Forum, STMicroelectronics, and BoardPusher. Identiv, a prominent player in RFID-enabled solutions for IoT, aims to drive the adoption of NFC-based Digital Product Passports. The event will emphasize the crucial role of NFC technology in advancing sustainable practices.

news.headline: BPGbio to showcase E2-based protein degradation program at TPD and Induced Proximity Summit in Boston.
news.summary: In Boston, BPGbio is set to showcase its innovative program focused on E2-based targeted protein degradation at the upcoming TPD and Induced Proximity Summit. The presentation will take place in Boston and highlight the company's novel approach in this field.

news.headline: Superior Industries to release Q3 2024 financial results on November 7, 2024, with conference call at 8:30AM ET. CEO and CFO to host.
news.summary: A U.S.-based company, Superior Industries International, Inc. (NYSE:SUP), shared plans to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter concluded on September 30, 2024, on Thursday, November 7, 2024. The forthcoming conference call, scheduled at 8:30 AM ET on November 7, 2024, will be led by Majdi Abulaban, President and CEO, along with Dan Lee, Senior VP and CFO.

news.headline: Climate X report explores how 2024 US election may impact climate risk; key financial sectors at stake.
news.summary: In New York, a recent report from Climate X highlights the potential influence of the 2024 US presidential election on climate risk management. The report emphasizes the substantial impact that the election outcome could have on strategies addressing climate change.

news.headline: LiveWire Group, Inc. reports positive Q3 2024 results amid industry challenges, recognized for best electric bike award.
news.summary: LiveWire Group, Inc. (NYSE: LVWR) announced its third quarter 2024 results today. Despite industry challenges, particularly for EV products in the U.S., the Company had notable achievements in Q3. The highlight was winning the title of the best 2024 electric bike by Motor Cycle News. Additionally, the global spotlight shone on S2 Del Mar® in August in Paris. Throughout Q3, LiveWire maintained its momentum by selling a higher number of on-road electric motorcycles in the U.S.

news.headline: Study finds 45% of companies exclude cybersecurity teams in AI development and implementation. Only 35% involve in policy.
news.summary: In Schaumburg, Illinois, a recent survey by ISACA, a global professional association promoting trust in technology, revealed that a mere 35% of cybersecurity professionals are engaged in formulating policies regarding the deployment of AI technology within their organizations. Shockingly, almost half (45%) stated they have no part in crafting, introducing, or executing AI solutions. The report, the "2024 State of Cybersecurity," sheds light on the lack of involvement in critical decision-making processes. These findings highlight a significant gap in proactive cybersecurity measures, suggesting a need for increased collaboration between cybersecurity teams and AI stakeholders.

news.headline: Simply Good Foods Company reports Q4 & full year 2024 financial results, including 11 weeks of OWYN performance acquisition.
news.summary: Denver-based company Simply Good Foods, known by its Nasdaq ticker symbol SMPL, has released its financial results for the fourteen and fifty-three weeks ending August 31, 2024. The company, which specializes in branded nutritional foods and snacks, recently acquired Only What You Need, Inc. (OWYN) on June 13, 2024. This acquisition means that approximately eleven weeks of OWYN's performance are reflected in Simply Good Foods' fourth quarter and full fiscal year results for 2024. The term "legacy" Simply Good Foods refers to the company's business activities not including OWYN.

news.headline: Cascade AI expands to provide every employee with a personal HR assistant, reducing workload and enhancing employee satisfaction.
news.summary: In Seattle, recent data shows that rapid employee adoption rates have demonstrated the potential for scaling personalized HR support effectively. This approach not only eases the burden on HR departments but also enhances the overall employee experience. The success of this strategy highlights the ability to efficiently implement tailored HR solutions on a large scale.

news.headline: CBRE Group, Inc. reports strong financial results for Q3 2024: GAAP EPS up 20% to $0.73, Core EPS up 67% to $1.20, revenue up 15%, net revenue up 20%.
news.summary: CBRE Group, Inc. released their Q3 2024 financial results, showing positive performance. GAAP EPS rose by 20% to $0.73, while Core EPS saw a significant 67% increase to $1.20. Revenue grew by 15%, with net revenue up by 20%. Resilient Business net revenue, including Turner & Townsend, went up by 18%. Global leasing revenue saw a surge of 19%, driven by a 24% increase in the US. Additionally, global property sales revenue grew for the first time in eight quarters, showing a 20% increase.

news.headline: Telecom company Rogers Communications releases Q3 2024 financial results.
news.summary: In recent news, it has been reported that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, which is a significant increase from the 3.5% decline experienced in 2020. This growth is attributed to the recovery from the COVID-19 pandemic and the rollout of vaccines worldwide. It is also estimated that the world population will reach 8 billion by 2023. Additionally, the unemployment rate in the United States has decreased to 4.8% in May 2021, showing signs of economic recovery. On the environmental front, carbon dioxide emissions are expected to rise by 1.5 billion metric tons in 2021, reaching a total of 41 billion metric tons globally. However, efforts to combat climate change are being made with the promise of $100 billion in climate financing for developing countries. This news highlights the complex interplay between economic growth, population expansion, employment trends, and environmental challenges facing the world today.

news.headline: Veritone, Talent Tech Labs studied job advertising strategies for best sourcing results, report reveals landscape insights.
news.summary: In Denver, Veritone, Inc. (NASDAQ: VERI), a prominent provider of enterprise AI solutions, and Talent Tech Labs, a respected talent technology research and advisory company, have unveiled fresh data in a collaborative report named "Next Generation of Job Advertising: Strategies for Generating the Best Sourcing Results." This study sheds light on advancements in job advertising, offering valuable insights on enhancing sourcing strategies to boost recruitment efforts. The report aims to guide companies in optimizing their sourcing techniques for better results.

news.headline: N-able to host Q3 earnings call on Nov 7, 2024 at 8:30am ET. Global software company providing IT services. Live webcast available.
news.summary: In Burlington, Massachusetts, N-able, Inc., a software company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol NABL, is set to hold a conference call regarding its financial performance in Q3 of 2024. The call is scheduled for November 7, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. ET. N-able specializes in supporting IT service providers with remote monitoring and management, data protection services, and security solutions on a global scale. Those interested can access a live webcast of the call on the N-able Investor Relations website at http://investors.n-able.com. A replay of the conference will also be available.

news.headline: Mary McDuffie joins SRM's International Advisory Board; led Navy Federal Credit Union with digital focus.
news.summary: SRM (Strategic Resource Management), a renowned advisory firm for financial institutions worldwide, has introduced Mary McDuffie, the former President and CEO of Navy Federal Credit Union, to its expanding International Advisory Board. McDuffie, who brings over 20 years of experience at Navy Federal Credit Union, is recognized for developing a member-focused and digitally advanced environment at the largest U.S. credit union in terms of assets. Her appointment reflects SRM's commitment to diversifying and enhancing its advisory expertise.

news.headline: Nebraska GOP pulls extreme anti-voter move, raising concerns.
BlackRock's Boivin warns of underestimation of election risk in markets.
news.summary: A recent report indicated that the global economy is projected to grow by 3.7% in 2021, following a 3.5% contraction in 2020. The recovery is attributed to various factors, including the rollout of Covid-19 vaccines and government stimulus packages. Advanced economies are expected to expand by 5.8%, with the United States leading at a growth rate of 6.4%. Emerging markets and developing economies are forecasted to grow by 6% collectively. However, the outlook remains uncertain due to ongoing pandemic challenges and disparities in vaccine distribution. Policymakers are urged to continue implementing supportive measures to sustain the positive momentum.

news.headline: Global steering shaft market to grow at 3.3% CAGR, reaching $7.9 billion by 2033. $5.7 billion market valuation in 2023. Regionally, Asia Pacific to see significant growth.
news.summary: The global steering shaft market is estimated to be worth US$5.7 billion in 2023, with a projected CAGR of 3.3% over the forecast period. Stricter safety regulations for automotive vehicles have increased the demand for high-quality steering shafts that meet safety standards, leading to innovation and competition among manufacturers. Rising consumer preference for electric vehicles is further boosting demand for specialized steering shafts, creating growth opportunities. Asia Pacific, especially China and India, is expected to witness significant market growth due to increasing demand for commercial and passenger vehicles. The market is projected to reach US$7.9 billion by 2033, with historic sales declining at a -3.5% CAGR. China is anticipated to dominate the East Asia market share by accounting for 2% in 2023.

news.headline: FinHub, a London-based tech developer, rebrands its financial tech division, promising innovative solutions.
news.summary: In a recent development on October 24, 2024, SEPA Cyber Tech Group Holding Ltd., a leading tech developer and venture capitalist in London, has decided to rename a segment of its business focusing on financial technology to FinHub. This restructuring showcases the company's commitment to the fintech sector. FinHub, the rebranded division, is set to bring innovative solutions to the market and represents a significant moment for the company. This move comes as SEPA Cyber Tech Group Holding Ltd. aims to solidify its presence in the financial technology industry and make a mark with its latest endeavors.

news.headline: Ardagh Metal Packaging S.A. to pay $0.10 quarterly dividend per share on December 19, 2024 to shareholders as of Dec 5, 2024.
news.summary: Luxembourg, as of October 24, 2024 - Ardagh Metal Packaging S.A. (NYSE: AMBP) has disclosed that its board of directors has given authorization for a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per ordinary share. This dividend will be disbursed on December 19, 2024, to shareholders listed on record as of December 5, 2024. For more information on this announcement, please refer to the company's official communication.
